title: Decision Fatigue Is Silently Draining $1,400 From You
hook: By 4 PM your brain is making choices the same way it does when drunk — and every retailer on earth knows exactly when to hit you.
angle: Decision fatigue isn't a productivity issue — it's a financial one. The documented science of how depleted willpower leads to measurably worse financial decisions, timed perfectly by retailers who engineer deal timing around your exhaustion schedule.
audience: Anyone who shops online, checks emails after work, or has ever agreed to an upsell when tired
key_numbers: 65% parole approval in morning vs 20% before lunch (Israeli judge study)
22% more spent on purchases made after 4 PM
$1,400 drained annually from late-day impulse spending
